title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins including Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Higgsfield, and others that extend Claude's capabilities for web scraping, model swapping, and token cost tracking. He demonstrates how these tools reduce AI output quality issues and accelerate development workflows.
